_comment: Manually-maintained native-image resource config (NOT generated by the tracing agent, so it survives agent regeneration). Includes OpenPDF's bundled resources, which native-image does not embed by default and which are needed for PDF output: font metrics (.afm), the glyph list (glyphlist.txt), CJK font descriptors (.properties) and localized error-message files (.lng). Without the .afm files BaseFont.createFont fails ('Cannot load font Times-Roman'); without glyphlist.txt width computation breaks and OpenPDF then rejects the resulting zero font size ('Font size too small: 0.0').
